recommendation.headline: Use Sportradar as the primary contracted official-sports feed, then add specialist providers for MMA, esports, SailGP, odds, and manual events.
recommendation.reason: The catalog spans mainstream sports, combat sports, esports, awards, creator events, local leagues, and SailGP. No single public provider cleanly covers all of that with settlement-grade data.
